Oil slump on Mideast peace hopes; Indian shares best day in 2 months

macro_news.headline: President approves PIA privatisation bill (Arif Habib consortium 75%)
macro_news.note: Privatisation momentum = positive market sentiment; not a holding

macro_news.headline: FY27 budget DETAIL — super tax CUT 10→8% for income >Rs500m; ABOLISHED only for mid-size Rs150-500m; banks/oil-gas/fertiliser EXCLUDED from cut
macro_news.note: VERIFICATION CORRECTION vs SFE graphic which said 'super tax abolished' — FALSE as blanket claim. ATRL (oil/refining) & FFC/ENGROH (fertiliser) EXCLUDED → no super-tax relief for them. Mid-cap names with income <Rs500m are the real winners.

macro_news.headline: FY27 budget — IT 0.25% FTR extended 3yrs to FY30; export min tax 2%→1.25%; exporter super tax waived
macro_news.note: CONFIRMED. IT FTR + exporter relief real. Textiles net positive. SFE graphic correct here.

macro_news.headline: FY27 budget — sales tax/duty removed on 100+ cancer medicine raw materials; CVT on declared foreign assets abolished; EV CKD concessions continued
macro_news.note: CONFIRMED. Cancer-API relief real → oncology/pharma positive. CGT on equities UNCHANGED (no new transaction tax) = sentiment positive, confirmed.

macro_news.source: SFE graphic (UNVERIFIED — not in BR/Dawn coverage)
macro_news.headline: SFE claims: energy brownfield import-tax abolished (CNERGY/ATRL); construction customs 10% (GHNI); Rs30bn Hyderabad-Sukkur M-6

Dawn shows construction WHT halved (not customs line); motorway specifics not found (Defence Rs3,000bn was flagged topmost priority). Treat as broker claim only — do NOT let drive any paper entry until confirmed in Finance Bill. Per Part G guardrail.
